docText: I have shipped full-stack product features in JavaScript and TypeScript, partnering with design and recruiting managers to improve ATS conversion for job seekers.

job.title: Frontend Engineer
job.fitAssessment: Strong fit for UI systems and growth loops.
job.notes: Emphasize recruiter empathy and measurable outcomes.

postingEnrichment.description: Build user-facing web products and collaborate with product and design.

profile.candidateProfileText: RESUME: Built React growth surfaces and wrote ATS-optimized messaging.
profile.resumeSourceText: Built product experiences in React and TypeScript.

instructions.userNotes: Keep the tone direct and concise.
